content: Phase 1: Setup environment & install dependencies (cryptography, qrcode, Pillow)
Phase 1: Create POC script - validate Smart Journal core (QR encrypt/decrypt + Schedule + GPS + B5 overlay)
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until ALL tests pass - 15/15 PASSED
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent (Kemenag green theme)
Phase 2: Backend - Auth (username/password + math captcha + JWT + rate limit)
Phase 2: Backend - User management with 9 roles + multi-role switching
Phase 2: Backend - Master Data (academic year, classes, rooms with GPS, subjects, schedules)
Phase 2: Backend - Smart Journal endpoints (QR validation + schedule + GPS check)
Phase 2: Backend - QR Code generator with B5 card template upload
Phase 2: Backend - Public real-time monitoring endpoint
Phase 2: Backend - Audit log + Security log + Branding settings
Phase 2: Backend - Seed demo accounts (admin, guru, walas, siswa, ortu, ek, tendik, piket, bk, tatib)
Phase 2: Frontend - Login + Math Captcha + Role Switcher
Phase 2: Frontend - Smart Journal flow (QR Scan + Form)
Phase 2: Frontend - Admin CRUDs (Master data, QR Generator, Audit Log, Branding)
Phase 2: Frontend - Public Real-time Monitoring page
Phase 2: Fix all bugs found by testing agent
